zh.lifeSummary: 當Helvide de Dampierre於1160年出生時，她的父親Guillaume Ier de Dampierre35歲，母親Ermengarde de Toucy35歲。她於1184年與Jean de Montmirail結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helvide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Helvide de Dampierre was born in 1160, her father, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, was 35 and her mother, Ermengarde de Toucy, was 35. She married Jean de Montmirail in 1184. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1224, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helvide de Dampierre est née en 1160, son père, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Toucy, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Montmirail en 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helvide de Dampierre 1160 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Ier de Dampierre 35 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Toucy 35. Sie hat 1184 Jean de Montmirail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helvide de Dampierre è nata il nel 1160, sua padre, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Toucy, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Montmirail nel 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1224, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helvide de Dampierreが1160年に生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier de Dampierreは35歳，母Ermengarde de Toucyは35歳であった。1184年にJean de Montmirailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helvide de Dampierre(이)가 1160년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Ier de Dampierre(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Toucy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1184년 Jean de Montmirail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helvide de Dampierre nasceu em 1160, seu pai, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Toucy, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Montmirail em 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helvide de Dampierre родилась в 1160 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume Ier de Dampierre было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Toucy, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Montmirail в 1184 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helvide de Dampierre nació en 1160, su papá, Guillaume Ier de Dampierre, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Toucy, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Jean de Montmirail en 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1224, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
